name: whitebox-pro-server-plugin-oauth
description: WhiteBox server plugin — self-hosted OAuth 2.1 authorization server (login, PKCE, token issuance, JWKS, RFC 8414 discovery). No external identity provider account required; issues JWTs consumable by whitebox-pro-auth-auth0's generic jwt() verifier, so it composes into config.mcp.auth and any plugin's auth exactly like Auth0 does.
